title: Handle Meshtastic ADMIN_APP metadata read requests
description: Why this exists: project-LICHEN-t2hn.15 review found that Zephyr currently emits synthetic DeviceMetadata during want_config_id sync, but documented ADMIN_APP get_device_metadata_request handling is not wired in the active C adapter. What needs to be done: decode the relevant ADMIN_APP request path, return bounded synthetic DeviceMetadata using the same policy as staged sync, and reject unsupported admin writes deterministically. Acceptance criteria: native_sim test covers get_device_metadata_request returning metadata; unsupported metadata/admin writes return explicit no-op/error; behavior uses the t2hn.15 metadata policy and does not claim Meshtastic RF firmware.
notes:
Implemented ADMIN_APP get_device_metadata_request handling in the Zephyr Meshtastic adapter. The adapter now parses ADMIN_APP Data payloads, returns synthetic DeviceMetadata with the same firmware branding policy as staged sync, wraps responses as FromRadio.packet -> MeshPacket.decoded -> Data(portnum=ADMIN_APP, payload=AdminMessage.get_device_metadata_response), preserves Data.request_id when the incoming MeshPacket has an id, and reports unsupported/malformed admin messages deterministically. AdminMessage oneof semantics are last-known-field wins for current Meshtastic admin.proto payload_variant fields; session_passkey field 101 is skipped as context; unknown future fields are skipped and do not override a prior known oneof arm.

Review evidence: initial reviewers found mixed-oneof/malformed handling gaps; fixed. Follow-up reviewers found P2 gaps for unknown low-number future fields and under-enumerated current AdminMessage oneof fields; fixed with explicit current field ranges and regression tests. Final reviewers Franklin/Plato reported no P0/P1/P2 findings; residual risk is hand-maintained admin.proto oneof field map for future upstream additions.

Validation on EC2 i-05e27e074db786e22 using EBS vol-0875d0df8bdf82a58 and clean worktree /mnt/lichen-zephyr/work/project-LICHEN-admin-final: git diff --check passed. Result: meshtastic_adapter PASS 55/55. close_reason: Completed: ADMIN_APP get_device_metadata_request returns bounded synthetic DeviceMetadata; unsupported admin writes and malformed admin payloads return deterministic status; native_sim/Twister evidence recorded.
